title: Spartan Weaponry: SimpleOres
description: Addon mod for Spartan Weaponry that adds compatibility with SimpleOres.
body:
**
Adds new [SimpleOres](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpleores) themed weapons to [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry).
** **
Partially based on CheezedFish's [Spartan Compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-compatibility) for 1.12.2.
** ![banner logo](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/31541291/193208677-36e634f8-4e5e-401a-9582-25483a7d0339.png) ### Supported materials: - **Mythril** - **Adamantium** - **Onyx** - Flame (ranged) - Shoots burning projectiles ###
Planned updates: - Fix any [bugs](https://github.com/KreloX/SpartanSimpleOres/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Abug)
**
Get yourself a server with 15% off the first month at Kinetic Hosting with code KRELOX
** [![Kinetic Hosting Banner](https://onedrive.live.com/embed?resid=6BF544900F9867AE%2113808&authkey=%21AJZMCAdCdWoTprs&width=900&height=194)](https://tinyurl.com/kreloxkinetic)
